<!-- source-snippet repo="scribe" path="docs/user/sdlc-howtos/applications/develop/pqs/index.rst" commit="9066c81716d62cbb879e677d5bec96bb5324891f" snippet="scribe-rst-code-docs-user-sdlc-howtos-applications-develop-pqs-index-sql-75" location="lines:75-79" -->
```sql
   select payload->'token'->'wallet'->>'label'
   from active('TokenOpen')
   where payload->'token'->'issue'->>'issuer' = 'foo'
     and (payload->'token'->>'quantity')::decimal > 42;

```
